name: Diesel Vintage Denim Jacket
description: Authentic vintage Diesel denim jacket in a classic wash. Features the iconic Diesel branding, premium denim construction, and a timeless silhouette. Perfect for layering in any season. Imported and carefully curated for the Falconia collection.

name: Nike Vintage Red Hoodie
description: Iconic Nike vintage hoodie in a bold red colorway. Features the classic swoosh logo, heavyweight cotton blend fabric, and a relaxed fit for ultimate comfort. A streetwear staple from our curated collection.

name: Speed Freak Racing Jacket
description: Bold racing-inspired jacket with Speed Freak branding. Features a unique graphic design, lightweight construction, and a modern street-racing aesthetic. Stand out with this statement piece.

name: Être Réel Worldwide Hoodie
description: Premium Être Réel hoodie with worldwide branding. Features an oversized fit, heavy cotton fleece, and embroidered details. A versatile piece that blends European style with streetwear culture.

name: Classic Leather Bomber Jacket
description: Premium leather bomber jacket with a sherpa-lined collar. Features genuine leather construction, ribbed cuffs and hem, and a luxurious sherpa lining for warmth. The ultimate statement piece for the colder months.

name: Space Graphic Vintage Tee
description: Vintage-inspired graphic tee with space-themed artwork. Features a relaxed fit, soft cotton fabric, and a retro print that adds character to any outfit. A Falconia fan favorite.

name: Nike Dark Cargo Pants
description: Nike cargo pants in a dark wash. Features multiple utility pockets, adjustable waist, and a tapered fit. Perfect for creating functional streetwear looks.

name: Adidas Retro Track Jacket
description: Retro Adidas track jacket with the iconic three stripes. Features a full zip closure, stand-up collar, and classic sporty silhouette. A timeless piece from the golden era of sportswear.
